name: Griffe Fongique
description: Assassin du Fléau dont les doigts se sont allongés en griffes de chitine noire. Silencieux et rapide, il déchire les défenses avant de se fondre dans le brouillard.
prompt: Sci-fi grimdark biomechanical horror, fungal assassin creature. Lean humanoid with elongated arms ending in massive black chitin claws. Agile crouching pose on ruined wall. Face obscured by fungal hood-like growth. Claws dripping with green viscous fluid. Emerging from thick spore fog. Silent and predatory. Cinematic moonlight, highly detailed, horror atmosphere.
